seo_description: Current time in Chișinău, Moldova. Live EET/EEST clock — UTC+2 standard, UTC+3 summer. Moldova time vs London, Bucharest, Kyiv, Moscow, New York.

faq.question: What time is it in Chișinău right now?
faq.answer: Chișinău operates on Eastern European Time (EET/UTC+2) during winter and Eastern European Summer Time (EEST/UTC+3) during summer. Moldova follows EU-aligned DST rules, advancing clocks one hour in late March and setting them back in late October. Use the live clock above to see the exact current time in Chișinău.

faq.question: What time zone is Chișinău in?
faq.answer: Chișinău is in the Eastern European Time zone (EET), which is UTC+2 during standard time (late October to late March) and EEST/UTC+3 during summer (late March to late October). This is the same timezone as Bucharest (Romania), Kyiv (Ukraine), Athens (Greece), Sofia (Bulgaria), Helsinki (Finland), and Tallinn (Estonia). Chișinău is 2 hours ahead of London year-round and 7 hours ahead of New York.

faq.question: Does Chișinău observe Daylight Saving Time?
faq.answer: Yes. Moldova observes Daylight Saving Time following the same schedule as the European Union. Clocks advance 1 hour on the last Sunday in March at 3:00 AM EET (becoming 4:00 AM EEST/UTC+3), and fall back 1 hour on the last Sunday in October at 4:00 AM EEST (becoming 3:00 AM EET/UTC+2). Although Moldova is not an EU member, it follows EU DST timing.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Chișinău and London?
faq.answer: Chișinău is 2 hours ahead of London year-round. During winter, Chișinău is on EET (UTC+2) and London is on GMT (UTC+0); during summer, Chișinău is on EEST (UTC+3) and London is on BST (UTC+1). Both observe DST on the same schedule, so the 2-hour difference is constant. When it is 10:00 AM in London, it is 12:00 PM (noon) in Chișinău.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Chișinău and Bucharest?
faq.answer: There is no time difference between Chișinău and Bucharest. Both cities use Eastern European Time (EET/UTC+2 in winter, EEST/UTC+3 in summer) and observe DST on the same schedule. Moldova and Romania share not only the same timezone but also the same language (Romanian/Moldovan), making cross-border coordination seamless.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Chișinău and Moscow?
faq.answer: Chișinău is 1 hour behind Moscow during winter (EET/UTC+2 vs MSK/UTC+3) and the same time as Moscow during summer (EEST/UTC+3 vs MSK/UTC+3), because Russia does not observe DST. When it is 12:00 PM in Moscow in January, it is 11:00 AM in Chișinău. In July, noon Moscow and noon Chișinău are the same.

faq.question: What is the best time to call Chișinău from the US?
faq.answer: From New York (EST/UTC-5), Chișinău is 7 hours ahead in winter and 7 hours ahead in summer (since both observe DST). To reach Chișinău during business hours (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EET), East Coast callers should dial between 2:00 AM – 10:00 AM Eastern. A practical window is early morning New York — a 7:00 AM Eastern call reaches Chișinău at 2:00 PM, well within business hours.

faq.question: What are business hours in Chișinău?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Chișinău run 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EET/EEST, Monday through Friday. Government offices and banks typically operate 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM. Moldova's economy is strongly tied to agriculture, wine production, and remittances from a large diaspora working in Italy, Portugal, and Russia. Chișinău has a growing IT sector, with several international outsourcing companies and startups operating from the city's central business district.

content_blocks.title: Chișinău Time Zone — EET/EEST, Aligned with Bucharest and Kyiv
content_blocks.content: Chișinău, the capital and largest city of Moldova, operates on Eastern European Time (EET/UTC+2) in winter and Eastern European Summer Time (EEST/UTC+3) in summer. Moldova follows EU DST timing — clocks advance on the last Sunday in March and fall back on the last Sunday in October — even though Moldova is not yet an EU member (it holds EU candidate status since June 2022). Chișinău shares its timezone exactly with Bucharest (Romania), Kyiv (Ukraine), Sofia (Bulgaria), Athens (Greece), Helsinki (Finland), and Tallinn (Estonia). The city is 2 hours ahead of London year-round (both observe DST synchronously), 1 hour ahead of Berlin and Paris, and 7 hours ahead of New York. In winter, Moscow (MSK/UTC+3) is 1 hour ahead of Chișinău; in summer, they are equal since Russia does not observe DST.

content_blocks.title: Moldova — Wine Country, Diaspora, and EU Aspirations
content_blocks.content: Chișinău is the economic, cultural, and political centre of Moldova, one of Europe's smallest and least-known countries. Moldova is renowned for its wine industry — it is one of the world's highest wine-producing nations per capita, with vast vineyards in the Codru, Stefan Voda, and Valul lui Traian regions. Cricova and Milestii Mici host two of the world's largest wine cellars. Moldova's economy is heavily supported by remittances from its large diaspora: over one million Moldovans live and work abroad, primarily in Italy, Portugal, Romania, and Russia. Chișinău has a growing IT outsourcing sector, with several companies leveraging Moldova's EU candidate status, low labour costs, and well-educated Romanian-speaking workforce to serve European clients. The city's architecture blends Soviet-era planning with revitalised pedestrian zones and a thriving cafe culture.

content_blocks.title: Scheduling Calls and Business Meetings with Chișinău
content_blocks.content: Chișinău's EET/EEST timezone (UTC+2 in winter, UTC+3 in summer) is 2 hours ahead of London year-round and 1 hour ahead of Berlin and Paris, making it well-integrated with European business rhythms. A 9:00 AM London meeting corresponds to 11:00 AM in Chișinău. From Bucharest (same timezone), there is zero time difference. From Kyiv (also EET/EEST), coordination is seamless. From New York (EST/UTC-5), the 7-hour gap means early Eastern morning calls — 7:00 AM Eastern is 2:00 PM Chișinău — are the most practical. From Dubai (UTC+4), Chișinău is 2 hours behind in winter and 1 hour behind in summer, with Dubai mornings aligning well with Chișinău late mornings. From Tokyo (UTC+9), Chișinău is 7 hours behind in summer (EEST) and 7 hours behind in winter (EET). Moldova's country code is +373; Chișinău's city code is 22.

time_difference_table.difference: 2 hours behind Dubai (1 hour behind in summer)
10 hours ahead (9 hours when LA is on PDT)
6 hours behind Tokyo (7 hours in winter)
